content_fingerprint: hugging face turns every gradio space into a self describing api for ai agents hugging face now automatically generates a machine readable agents md endpoint for every gradio space letting coding agents like claude code codex and pi discover and interact with hosted demos on their own terms with no manual configuration required hugging face has enabled a built in agents md endpoint on every gradio space hosted on the platform the company announced april 17 the endpoint exposes a machine readable api description that ai agents can parse and call without any developer setup or custom tooling the
